violations.text: The handwashing signs are lacking at the hand-washing sink in the bar and coffee stations. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
Paper towels and soap are lacking at the hand-washing sinks in the bar and coffee stations. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

Inspector observed shellfish tags lacking last used dates. Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

Tomato sauce, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

Tuna sauce and salmon was observed held between 50-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the dishwashing area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
